goal: Implement BFS proximity ranking: proximity.py phase, ContextGraph.prioritize_files(), and updated prioritize_context() workflow

tasks.name: Create proximity.py with rank_by_proximity BFS
microSteps: Run TestRankByProximityBasic, TestRankByProximityDistances, TestRankByProximityEdgeTypes, TestRankByProximityConnectedSymbols — expect all fail (ImportError: no proximity module)
Create .cnogo/scripts/context/phases/proximity.py with rank_by_proximity(storage, focal_node_ids, max_depth=5) -> list[dict]

Algorithm: pre-fetch all nodes into cache, build bidirectional adjacency map from CALLS/IMPORTS/EXTENDS/USES_TYPE edges, BFS from focal node IDs using collections.deque, track min distance per node, group by file_path, collect connected_symbols per file, exclude focal files (distance 0), sort by min_distance ascending
Run tests — expect all 14 rank_by_proximity tests pass
tasks.action: Create proximity.py phase file implementing bidirectional BFS. Use the same pattern as impact.py: pre-fetch all nodes, build edge maps from get_all_relationships_by_types for CALLS/IMPORTS/EXTENDS/USES_TYPE, BFS with deque tracking distance. Return list of {file_path, min_distance, connected_symbols} sorted by distance.

tasks.name: Add ContextGraph.prioritize_files() method
microSteps: Run TestPrioritizeFiles — expect all fail (AttributeError: no prioritize_files method)
Add prioritize_files(self, focal_symbols, max_files=20) method to ContextGraph class in __init__.py
Method resolves symbol names to node IDs via storage.search(), extracts top match per symbol, calls rank_by_proximity(), truncates to max_files
Run TestPrioritizeFiles — expect all 5 tests pass
tasks.action: Add prioritize_files() to ContextGraph. Resolve each focal_symbol name to a node ID using storage.search(name), take the first exact match. Collect resolved IDs, call rank_by_proximity(storage, ids, max_depth=3), return results[:max_files].

tasks.name: Update prioritize_context() workflow function
microSteps: Run TestPrioritizeContext — expect failures (TypeError: unexpected keyword arguments)
Update prioritize_context() signature to accept focal_symbols=None and max_files=20
Replace body: call g.prioritize_files(focal_symbols or [], max_files), transform results to {path, distance, reason} format, include focal_symbols_resolved in return dict
Run TestPrioritizeContext — expect all 6 tests pass
tasks.action: Rewrite prioritize_context(repo_path, focal_symbols=None, max_files=20). If not indexed, return {enabled: false, error}. Otherwise call g.prioritize_files(focal_symbols or [], max_files). Transform each result to {path: file_path, distance: min_distance, reason: f'{len(connected_symbols)} connected symbols'}. Return {enabled: true, ranked_files: [...], focal_symbols_resolved: [resolved names]}. Wrap in try/except for graceful degradation.

commitMessage: feat(graph): implement BFS proximity ranking with prioritize_files() and updated prioritize_context()
